CREATE TABLE test_intervals (event_time DateTime, event_type String);
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (now() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, 'middle');
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (now() - INTERVAL 10 DAY, 'end');
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS one_hour_later FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL '2 days' AS two_days_later FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time, event_time + toIntervalDay(3) AS three_days_later FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 1 WEEK AS one_week_later FROM test_intervals WHERE event_type = 'start';
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 30 MINUTE AS thirty_minutes_later FROM test_intervals WHERE event_type = 'middle';
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 1 MONTH AS one_month_later, event_time + INTERVAL '2 hours' AS two_hours_later FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 1 QUARTER AS one_quarter_later, event_time + INTERVAL '1' YEAR AS one_year_later FROM test_intervals WHERE event_type = 'end';
SELECT now() AS current_time, (SELECT current_time + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time_after_fifteen_minutes;
WITH (SELECT now()) AS current_time SELECT current_time, current_time + INTERVAL 10 SECOND AS ten_seconds_later;
SELECT t1.event_time, (t1.event_time + INTERVAL 5 DAY) AS updated_time FROM test_intervals AS t1 JOIN test_intervals AS t2 ON t1.event_time > t2.event_time WHERE t2.event_type = 'end';
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_intervals) DAY AS extended_time FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time, event_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR + INTERVAL 30 MINUTE AS combined_time FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_time FROM test_intervals WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 10;
